prompt: Mock up a classic late-90s finance portal in rich teal and mustard, complete with beveled buttons, GIF animations of spinning dollar signs, ticker-tape marquee, and a table-heavy layout featuring “NEW!” blink tags for IPO tips.
prompt_refined: Generate a classic late-1990s finance portal screenshot. The design should feature a rich teal and mustard color scheme. Include prominent beveled buttons, a horizontal ticker-tape marquee at the top displaying financial news, and a table-heavy content layout. Within the tables, incorporate 'NEW!' blink tags next to sections detailing IPO tips. Place small, spinning dollar sign GIF animations as decorative elements throughout the interface.
objects: Horizontal ticker-tape marquee at the top
Small, spinning dollar sign GIF animations
